evidenceSnippetOriginal: It does not use your conversations to train any AI model or share any data with OpenAI, ensuring your information remains private. Functionality is split into a Work and a Web tab. High risk data should only be used in the Work search.
evidenceLocator: Yale AI Tools and Resources, Copilot Chat
